overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin in a driving simulation game, traveling along a coastal highway during overcast autumn weather. The truck passes a lighthouse, road signage, a blue truck, colorful beach huts, and residential houses.

agents.ego_description: driving the truck along the coastal highway with the lighthouse visible in the distance on the left

two-lane asphalt road stretching into the distance along the coastline
red and white striped lighthouse standing on the coastline

tall grass and sand dunes between the road and the beach
trees with orange and red autumn foliage on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along an open coastal highway with the lighthouse visible in the distance. The windshield wiper activates briefly as the vehicle passes grassy dunes on the left and autumn trees on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with road signage approaching town

events.description: overtaking a blue and white box truck on the right side of the road
passing a 30 mph speed limit sign on the left side

segments.scene_description: The truck overtakes a blue box truck on the right and passes road signs including a 30 mph speed limit marker. The lighthouse remains visible in the distance as the vehicle approaches a more developed area.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal town street with beach huts and residential houses

white painted houses with dark roofs lining the right side of the street
low stone wall replacing the metal guardrail along the beach side
tall street lighting poles along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a coastal town area, passing colorful beach huts on the left and white residential houses on the right. The metal guardrail gives way to a stone wall as the road curves slightly through the built-up area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it travels from an open coastal highway into a developed seaside town. It begins with the vehicle moving past grassy dunes and autumn trees under an overcast sky, with a distant lighthouse serving as a focal point while the windshield wiper activates briefly. As the truck maintains its course, the camera captures the vehicle overtaking a blue box truck and passing a 30 mph speed limit sign. The scene then shifts from the open road to a more built-up environment, where the landscape transforms into a coastal town featuring colorful beach huts on the left and white residential houses on the right. Finally, the metal guardrail transitions into a stone wall as the road curves gently through the residential area.
